S.O. 2393(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of section 20 of the Drugs and
Cosmetics Act, 1940 (23 of 1940), the Central Government hereby appoints the persons specified in column
(2) of the Table given below as Government Analysts for the whole of India in respect of the classes of drugs
mentioned against their names specified in column (3) of said Table, namely:—
Name, designation and address of the Sl. No. Class of Drugs
2. Dr. (Ms.) Reba Chhabra, (i) Human Immunodeficiency Virus;
Scientist Grade-I, (ii) Hepatitis B Surface Antigen; and
National Institute of Biologicals, (iii) Hepatitis C Virus.
3. Dr. J. P. Prasad, (i) Human Albumin;
National Institute of Biologicals, (Intramuscular and intravenous);
Plot No. A-32, Sector 62, (iii) Human Coagulation Factor VIII;
Institutional Area, Noida, (iv) Human Coagulation Factor IX;
